title: Translation Ready
description: Kid-2 asks Alexa how to translate a suspiciously harmless sentence into French, while Grandma Kelly and Pa immediately realize where the joke is going.
alt: Grandson sits on the couch laughing as he asks Alexa, 'How do you say A seal pushed me yesterday in French?' Grandma Kelly looks embarrassed and frustrated while Pa sits nearby with a deadpan expression holding his Pa mug. An Alexa device glows blue on the coffee table.
